query: SELECT id, chaveJ AS chavej, nome, pctConsig AS pctconsig, pctConsorcio AS pctconsorcio, pctCc AS pctcc, pctOurocap AS pctourocap, pctSeguro AS pctseguro, pctDental AS pctdental, ativo FROM supervisores ORDER BY id;
